name: Sukhna Lake
description: A serene man-made lake nestled at the foothills of the Shivalik range, where golden sunsets paint the water while joggers, boaters, and artists gather along its tranquil promenade.
history: Created in 1958 by damming the Sukhna Choe stream as part of Le Corbusier's city plan. Declared a protected wetland and bird sanctuary.
